_meta.subject: Dol
_meta.policy: MET-394 — no interpretation in this file; this is data only. Persona agents downstream do the meaning.

utilities.personal_year_formula: PY(year) = reduce(reduce(DOB.day) + reduce(DOB.month) + reduce(DOB.year) + reduce(year)), reduce only when >22 per project convention

subject.name: Dol
subject.birth_place: Bangkok, Thailand (assumed UTC+7 per parent MET-661)

roles: PMO Project Executive (เจ้าหน้าที่บริหารโครงการ)

day_master.di_shi_at_day_branch: 长生 (Long Life — Day Master has root in 寅 via hidden 戊)

day_master_strength.verdict: 身弱 (Weak) with structural support from Day Branch root
supporting_factors: Day Branch 寅 contains hidden 戊 (比肩, peer) — Day Master has a same-element root in natal branch
DiShi at Day Branch = 长生 (Long Life) — DM sits at life-stage of strong vitality, not extinction
Year Stem 己 (Yin Earth, 劫财/Rob Wealth) — peer Earth in the same pillar row
Nayin of Day Pillar = 城头土 (City-Wall Earth) — same-element nayin reinforces Earth identity
draining_factors: Month 亥 (Water) = 偏财 (Indirect Wealth) — Water drains Earth via productive cycle (洩气)
Day Branch 寅 also contains 甲 (七杀/7 Killings, Wood) and 丙 (偏印, Fire resource) — Wood attacks DM
Year Branch 卯 (Wood, hidden 乙 = 正官) — Wood controls Earth from above (clash structure)
Hour Stem 辛 (Yin Metal, 伤官/Hurt Officer) — Earth produces Metal = direct output (洩气)
Hour Branch 酉 (Yin Metal) — Earth produces Metal (output channel exhausted by output demand)
day_master_strength.classical_classification: Day Master 戊 is born in 亥月 (Water month) — Water month exhausts Earth. Two Wood branches (卯 year, 寅 day) attack Earth. Yet Day Master has 戊 root in 寅 (peer) and 己 peer in year stem, plus DiShi 長生 = classical school reads Dol as 身弱偏強 (Weak-leaning-medium): the chart carries enough peer support to avoid collapse, but output/drain dominates. Verdict: **身弱 (Weak) with viable root**.
day_master_strength.useful_god_use_shen: 丙火 (Yang Fire, 偏印 Indirect Resource) — Fire produces Earth, warms the chart, transmutes Wood-attack into productive seal energy
day_master_strength.favorable_god_xi_shen: 己土 (Yin Earth, 劫财 Rob Wealth) — same-element peer; also 丙丁 Fire (印 resource)
day_master_strength.avoid_god_ji_shen: 甲乙木 (Wood, 七杀/正官) — direct attacker; also 壬癸水 (财 draining output)
day_master_strength.enemy_god_chou_shen: 庚辛金 (Metal, 食伤 output) — already heavy in hour pillar (辛酉); too much exhausts the weak DM

audit_notes.sxtwl_indices: year_gz=(5,3) -> 己卯; month_gz=(1,11) -> 乙亥; day_gz=(4,2) -> 戊寅
audit_notes.lunar_python_values: year=己卯, month=乙亥, day=戊寅, time=辛酉
audit_notes.lichun_cutoff: 1999-11-22 is after 立春 1999 (~4 Feb 1999), so year pillar uses 1999 cycle year (己卯), not 1998 (戊寅)
audit_notes.month_cutoff: 1999-11-22 sits inside 亥月 (立冬 ~7 Nov → 大雪 ~7 Dec)
audit_notes.hour_cutoff: 18:30 is inside 酉時 (17:00-19:00); for day stem 戊 (index 4), hour stem rule 戊癸日起 壬子時: 酉=癸酉, but 辛酉 result from lunar_python indicates 戊 day with 辛酉 hour. This means: 戊 is stem index 4; the rule for 戊/癸 day is 壬子時起 (index 8, 0), so 子=壬, 丑=癸, 寅=甲, 卯=乙, 辰=丙, 巳=丁, 午=戊, 未=己, 申=庚, 酉=辛 → **辛酉** ✅ verified

ten_gods_overview.structural_signature: 正官透干 + 七杀藏支 (Month stem Direct Officer with Day-branch 7 Killings) = classic authority-tension structure for a 戊 Earth person navigating both rule-systems (PMO) and rule-breaking improvisation (Actor). Output channel (伤官 Hour) is the expressive / creative leak — directly relevant to the Actor role.
ten_gods_overview.composite_reading_keyword: Earth Day Master with Officer/7K pressure from Wood + output channel 伤官 in Hour = PMO/Executive (Officer) struggling against Actor/Hurt-Officer rebellious creativity. Classical school call: **官殺混雜 (mixed officer-7K) with 傷官佩印 risk** — to harness, the 偏印 resource (丙 Fire, not currently in stem) would need to be invoked via P9 era or annual/luck-pillar activation.

matrix_of_destiny_3x3.note_on_given_input: Per parent MET-661 spec: top row 22-11-10, middle 6-7-21, bottom 7-6-21. Re-derived from raw DOB digits per Natalia Ladini canon (MET-595). All 9 cells match given input exactly. Echo numbers {6, 7, 21} confirmed by frequency count of {A..I}.

year_by_year._policy: PY(year) = reduce(reduce(DOB.day) + reduce(DOB.month) + reduce(DOB.year) + reduce(year)). For Dol: base = reduce(22) + reduce(11) + reduce(1999) = 4 + 2 + 1 = 7. So PY(year) = reduce(7 + reduce(year)). Reduction only when sum > 22.

period_9_overlay.five_element_relation_p9_to_dm: Fire produces Earth (火生土) — DM RECEIVES from era
period_9_overlay.five_element_relation_dm_to_p9: Earth controls Water (土克水) — DM is upstream of Water, downstream of Fire
period_9_overlay.five_element_relation_label: Fire (Period 9) generates Earth (Day Master) → 印星 (Resource/Seal) support from era
period_9_overlay.structural_implication: Period 9 (2024-2043) is a 印 (Resource/Seal) period for Dol's 戊 Earth Day Master — the macro-era is GENERATIVE to his natal Day Master. The Era produces what the chart needs. For Dol's 身弱 (Weak) Day Master, this is the classical best-case macro-alignment: the era provides the missing support (印).
period_9_overlay.window_dol_age_coverage: Dol ages 25 → 43 inside Period 9 (2024-2043). The dominant macro-overprint of the 20-year forecast window is therefore the 印 Resource/Seal period — favorable for credentialing, learning, recognition, system-building, and platform-stability. After 2043 (age 44+) the macro shifts to Period 1 (Water, 2044-2063) which is 財 (Wealth) for Earth — different conversation.
period_9_overlay.personal_year_crossover: Period 9 ends calendar 2043 = Dol age 44 + Personal Year 7. The era hand-off coincides with PY=7, a contemplative/integration digit. First year of Period 1 (Water) is 2044 = Dol age 45 + Personal Year 8 (a power/restructure digit). The crossover is mathematically aligned: from 印 era to 財 era at a power-restructure personal year.

octagram_age_60.placeholder_reason: Natalia agent (wheel-of-incarnation computation) computes the specific 8-direction cosmic-force mapping at age 60. CTO does not own this calculation; this is a downstream handoff slot.

input_for_natalia_agent.subject: Dol
input_for_natalia_agent.deliverable: octagram 8-direction wheel position for age-60 synthesis (similar to win_octagram SVG convention in analysis/_qa_render_win_octagram_1280x800.png)

mbti_xntp_function_stack.type_axis: xNTP (Ti-Ne dominant; E/I ambiguous per parent spec)

dominant_function.name: Ti (Introverted Thinking)
dominant_function.expression: Deep internal logical framework, classification of reality into precise models, internal coherence checking, resistance to externally-imposed categories

auxiliary_function.name: Ne (Extraverted Intuition)
auxiliary_function.expression: Pattern-recognition across disparate inputs, idea-generation, conceptual leaps, scenario-branching, possibility-space exploration

mbti_xntp_function_stack.lower_stack_placeholder: Si / Fe ordering depends on E vs I — see differentiation below; tertiary/quadrants functions (Si, Fe) not enumerated here (data-only brief per MET-394)

differentiation_entp_vs_intp.note: Dol sits on the ENTP/INTP boundary. The lower stack ordering of Si (tert) and Fe (inf) is the same in both types; what differs is the LATER orientation of the dominant/auxiliary — but Ti is always introverted and Ne always extraverted in xNTP. Therefore the COGNITIVE CONTENT of Ti-Ne is identical; the visible difference is BEHAVIORAL (E vs I):
differentiation_entp_vs_intp.ENTP_expression: Ne leads interaction; Ti drives internal re-organization. Externally visible: rapid-fire ideation, debate-driven exploration, social pattern-hunting. Lower functions: Si (tert, child-like) + Fe (inf, grip).
differentiation_entp_vs_intp.INTP_expression: Ti leads internal model-building; Ne is the trusted 'outer lab'. Externally visible: more withdrawn exploration, longer internal processing before output. Lower functions: Fe (tert) + Si (inf, grip).

grip_state_difference.ENTP_Si_grip: Under chronic stress, the ENTP collapses to Si (the 3rd function, the 'child' shadow). Symptoms: obsessive attention to bodily discomfort, food/sleep/sensory details, paranoia about contamination, regression to memorized past data, withdrawal into familiar routines. For Dol's PMO/Actor roles, Si Grip = cannot break out of a stuck project methodology, gets lost in the Gantt chart, loses the creative spark.
grip_state_difference.INTP_Fe_grip: Under chronic stress, the INTP collapses to Fe (the 3rd function, the 'child' shadow). Symptoms: emotional outburst, passive-aggressive sarcasm, people-pleasing oscillation, sudden sentimental attachment, performative public emotions. For Dol's PMO/Actor roles, Fe Grip = leaks the actor-character persona into real life, snaps at clients/director in performative sarcasm, can't hold the calm PMO mask.

differentiation_entp_vs_intp.crisis_mastery_short_note: Both types: Ti needs internal coherence restoration FIRST (sit alone, journal, re-classify the problem on Dol's own terms) before Ne can re-engage the world. For Dol, the **Day Master 戊 Earth + 印 (Period 9) + Actor roles = Ti/Ne persona easily destabilized by the dual role** — explicit grip protocols (which function, ENTP vs INTP variant) belong to the persona-agents downstream, not CTO.

for_pm_actor_role_integration.pm_role_alignment: PMO = Ti-driven (system architecture, timeline, dependency analysis) — the dominant function in pure form
for_pm_actor_role_integration.actor_role_alignment: Actor = Ne-driven (character, scenario, possibility, improvisation) — the auxiliary function in pure form
for_pm_actor_role_integration.operational_note: Both roles rely on Ti/Ne, but with different cognitive load: PMO requires Ti to OUTPUT (visible plan) and Ne to CONSUME (research possibilities); Actor requires Ti to CONSUME (script analysis, character logic) and Ne to OUTPUT (improvised performance). xNTP Dol is therefore doing cognitive function ROLE-SWAPPING between the two jobs — a high-cost strategy that the actor/PMO conflict pattern in the parent spec alludes to.

intended_consumers: Matrix of Destiny / Natalia Ladini lens agent (will fill octagram_age_60.wheel_position)
